wines.name: Seven Daughters Moscato
wines.flavor: Peach, orange blossom, honey, light citrus. Soft and fruity.
wines.bestFor: Guests who want sweet, easy, and not harsh.
wines.pitch: Sweet, fruity, and super easy to drink — great with anything spicy or dessert.

wines.name: Chateau Ste. Michelle Riesling
wines.flavor: Crisp apple, peach, citrus, bright finish; slight sweetness.
wines.bestFor: Spicy food people or anyone who wants light but flavorful.
wines.pitch: Crisp and refreshing with a touch of fruit — perfect with spicy dishes.

wines.name: Ruffino Pinot Grigio
wines.flavor: Crisp, clean citrus, pear, light mineral.
wines.bestFor: Guests who say “I want something light and not sweet.”
wines.pitch: Light, clean, and dry — an easy pick if you don’t want anything sweet.

wines.name: Dashwood Sauvignon Blanc
wines.flavor: Citrus, lime, grapefruit, fresh herbs; very crisp.
wines.bestFor: Guests who want crisp, dry, refreshing.
wines.pitch: Crisp and super refreshing — the safest dry white with food.

wines.name: Mariana Rosé
wines.flavor: Strawberry, citrus, refreshing finish.
wines.bestFor: Guests who want something light but not boring.
wines.pitch: Light, refreshing, and food-friendly — great if they can’t decide between red and white.
wines.avoidIf: They want a big bold red.

wines.name: Kendall-Jackson Vintner’s Reserve Chardonnay
wines.flavor: Apple, pear, vanilla, buttery/oaky notes.
wines.bestFor: Guests who like rich, smooth whites.
wines.pitch: Classic rich Chardonnay — smooth, slightly buttery, and great with creamy dishes.

wines.name: Stoller Chardonnay
wines.flavor: Brighter, cleaner chardonnay style; citrus/apple; less heavy.
wines.bestFor: Chardonnay drinkers who don’t want super buttery.
wines.pitch: A cleaner, brighter Chardonnay — smooth but not heavy.

wines.name: Zardetto Prosecco
wines.flavor: Green apple, pear, citrus; crisp bubbles.
wines.bestFor: Celebrations, brunch, fried food, ‘just want something fun.’
wines.pitch: Crisp bubbles — perfect with apps, brunch, and anything fried.
wines.avoidIf: They want a still wine only.

wines.name: La Crema Pinot Noir
wines.flavor: Cherry, raspberry, light spice; smooth finish.
wines.bestFor: Red drinkers who want smooth and not heavy.
wines.pitch: Smooth, lighter red — great if they want red but not too bold.

wines.name: Uno Malbec
wines.flavor: Dark fruit, plum, cocoa, smooth spice.
wines.bestFor: Steak/prime rib guests who want bold but smooth.
wines.pitch: Bold dark-fruit red that’s smooth — killer with steak.

wines.name: Optima Zinfandel
wines.flavor: Jammy berry, pepper, smoky spice.
wines.bestFor: BBQ lovers and richer foods.
wines.pitch: Bold, spicy red — awesome with BBQ and anything smoky.

wines.name: Silk & Spice Red Blend
wines.flavor: Dark fruit, spice, smooth finish.
wines.bestFor: Guests who want a smooth ‘easy red’ without overthinking.
wines.pitch: Smooth, crowd-pleasing red with a little spice — easy pick for almost anyone.
wines.avoidIf: They want a very light red.

wines.name: Josh Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.flavor: Black cherry, plum, light oak, smooth tannins.
wines.bestFor: Classic red drinkers and steak/prime rib.
wines.pitch: Classic cab — bold, smooth, and made for steak.

wines.name: Dough Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.flavor: Dark fruit, oak, structured finish.
wines.bestFor: Cab lovers wanting something a bit more serious.
wines.pitch: A richer cab with more structure — excellent with prime rib.

wines.name: Justin Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.flavor: Dark berries, oak, spice; fuller tannin grip.
wines.bestFor: Guests who like bold, steakhouse-style reds.
wines.pitch: Big, bold cab — the steakhouse pick.
wines.avoidIf: They dislike tannins / want soft reds.

wines.name: La Crema Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.flavor: Dark fruit, oak spice, polished finish.
wines.bestFor: Cab drinkers who want a nicer upgrade option.
wines.pitch: A more polished cab — great upgrade for prime rib.

wines.name: Trinity Oaks Chardonnay
wines.flavor: Easy, smooth chardonnay style.
wines.bestFor: Guests who want house wine and something simple.
wines.pitch: Smooth, simple house Chardonnay — easy with food.
wines.avoidIf: They want crisp/dry like Sauvignon Blanc.

wines.name: Trinity Oaks Pinot Noir
wines.flavor: Light red fruit, smooth finish.
wines.bestFor: Guests who want a lighter house red.
wines.pitch: Smooth, lighter house red — easy to drink.

wines.name: Trinity Oaks Merlot
wines.flavor: Plum and soft dark fruit, easy finish.
wines.bestFor: Guests who want soft red without tannin bite.
wines.pitch: Soft, smooth house red — easy pick if they don’t want a big cab.

wines.name: Trinity Oaks Cabernet Sauvignon
wines.flavor: Dark fruit, simple cab profile.
wines.bestFor: Guests who want house cab with steak/meat.
wines.pitch: Classic house cab — straightforward and food-friendly.
